final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: lifestyle product shot, placed on a TV console cabinet in a living room
Primary request: place the reference product on a cabinet beneath a home TV feature wall, with focus on the product, blending naturally into the scene without standing out awkwardly
Scene/backdrop: modern home living room, TV accent wall background, low TV console cabinet surface, softly blurred background
Subject: the reference product sitting on the TV cabinet surface, centered and prominent
Style/medium: photorealistic lifestyle photography
Composition/framing: eye-level medium close-up, shallow depth of field, product as focal point
Lighting/mood: warm ambient indoor lighting, soft and natural, calm domestic atmosphere
Color palette: neutral warm tones — off-white, wood grain, muted greys consistent with a modern living room
Materials/textures: smooth cabinet surface, subtle wood grain texture, soft background bokeh
Constraints: product must remain the clear focal point; background elements (TV wall, cabinet) serve only as context and must not compete visually; product placement must look natural and unforced
Avoid: overly staged or artificial placement, harsh shadows, cluttered background, product looking "pasted on"
